scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to SkyPark! The infinity pool is for hotel guests only, but the observation deck has the same amazing views. 57 floors high!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 스카이파크에 오신 걸 환영해요! 인피니티 풀은 호텔 투숙객만인데, 전망대에서도 같은 뷰예요. 57층 높이!

choices.text: 57 floors! The view must be incredible!
When is the best time for photos?
Why can't I use the pool?

scenes.npcDialog: Orchard Road has every brand you can imagine! ION, Ngee Ann City, Takashimaya... Great for window shopping too. The air conditioning is very nice!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오차드 로드에 상상할 수 있는 모든 브랜드가 있어요! ION, 니앤 시티, 다카시마야... 아이쇼핑도 좋아요. 에어컨이 아주 시원해요!

choices.text: Air conditioning is perfect in this heat!
Which mall has the best sales?

scenes.npcDialog: The National Museum tells Singapore's story! From fishing village to global city in 60 years. The multimedia exhibits are very interactive!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 국립박물관에서 싱가포르 이야기를 해요! 어촌에서 글로벌 도시까지 60년 만에. 멀티미디어 전시가 아주 인터랙티브해요!

choices.text: I love interactive exhibits! Where should I start?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Would you like an audio guide with your ticket?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 티켓과 함께 오디오 가이드 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, do you have one in Korean?
How much is the audio guide?

scenes.npcDialog: Hop-on hop-off bus? You can get off at any of our 20 stops.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 홉온홉오프 버스요? 20개 정류장 어디서든 내릴 수 있어요.

choices.text: Which stop is closest to the main square?
How often does the bus come?

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with anything?
Welcome! You have a private room with shared bathroom. Breakfast is included!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 공용 화장실이 있는 개인실이에요. 조식 포함이에요!

choices.text: Great! What time is breakfast served?
Perfect, can I see the room first?

scenes.npcDialog: We have a half-day group tour for 35 euros. Interested?

choices.text: How big is the group usually?
That's too expensive for a group.
I want a private tour for that price.

scenes.npcDialog: The Supertrees are solar-powered! At night they light up - the Garden Rhapsody show is at 7:45 and 8:45pm. The skywalk between trees is amazing!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 수퍼트리는 태양광이에요! 밤에 조명이 켜져요 - 가든 랩소디 쇼가 7:45, 8:45에 있어요. 나무 사이 스카이워크가 끝내줘요!

choices.text: Solar-powered trees! Singapore is so innovative.
I'll come back for the light show tonight!
Why would I pay to walk on trees?

scenes.npcDialog: The Merlion represents Singapore! Half lion, half fish. The big one spouts water. Best photos from across the river with Marina Bay Sands behind!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 머라이언은 싱가포르의 상징이에요! 반은 사자, 반은 물고기. 큰 건 물을 뿜어요. 마리나 베이 샌즈 배경으로 강 건너서 찍으면 제일 예뻐요!

choices.text: Thanks for the photo tip! The skyline is amazing.
Half lion, half fish - what's the legend behind it?

scenes.npcDialog: Newton is Singapore's famous outdoor hawker! Been in Crazy Rich Asians movie! Satay, BBQ stingray, carrot cake... What looks good to you?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 뉴턴은 유명한 야외 호커예요! 크레이지 리치 아시안 영화에 나왔어요! 사테, BBQ 가오리, 캐럿 케이크... 뭐가 맛있어 보여요?

choices.text: Crazy Rich Asians! I'll have what they had!
BBQ stingray sounds adventurous! I'll try it.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like me to take your picture?

choices.text: Yes, please! Just press this button.
Thank you! Could you take a few?

scenes.npcDialog: Our night tour shows you the city all lit up. Interested?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 야경 투어로 조명이 켜진 도시를 보여드려요. 관심 있으세요?

choices.text: Yes! What time does it start?
That sounds beautiful. How long is it?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to take a break?

choices.text: Where can I sit and rest?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Help yourself to the breakfast buffet.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좋은 아침이에요! 조식 뷔페 마음껏 드세요.

choices.text: Thank you! Is there fresh juice?
Great, what time does breakfast end?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you eligible for any discounts?

choices.text: Yes, I'm a student. Here's my ID.
I should get in for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Maxwell Food Centre is legendary! Try chicken rice - it won a Michelin star! Only $5! Or laksa, char kway teow, satay... What you like?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 맥스웰 푸드 센터는 전설이에요! 치킨 라이스 드셔보세요 - 미슐랭 스타 받았어요! 5달러만! 락사, 차귀테오, 사테도 있어요. 뭐 좋아하세요?

choices.text: Michelin star for $5! I'll have the chicken rice!
What's laksa like? I've never tried it.

scenes.npcDialog: Kaya toast is our traditional breakfast! Toast with kaya jam and butter, soft-boiled eggs with soy sauce, and kopi! The eggs are runny - mix them!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 카야 토스트는 전통 아침이에요! 카야잼과 버터 바른 토스트, 간장 넣은 반숙 계란, 코피! 계란이 흐물해요 - 섞으세요!

choices.text: Runny eggs with soy sauce! That's unique.

scenes.npcDialog: Bugis Street is budget shopping paradise! Clothes, accessories, souvenirs - all cheap! Bargaining is expected. Start at half price!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 부기스 스트리트는 예산 쇼핑 천국이에요! 옷, 악세서리, 기념품 - 다 저렴해요! 흥정 당연히 해요. 반값부터 시작하세요!

choices.text: Start at half price - got it! Any negotiation tips?
I love a good bargain! Let's go!

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: Where's the best spot for photos?
Where can I get the best view?
Take me to a secret place.

scenes.npcDialog: This building dates back to the 17th century.

choices.text: What was it used for back then?
I don't care about old stuff.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for a good place to eat nearby?

choices.text: Can you recommend a local favorite?
I only eat at my hotel.

scenes.npcDialog: Your ticket includes one checked bag. Would you like to check any luggage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 티켓에 위탁 수하물 1개가 포함되어 있어요. 수하물 부치시겠어요?

choices.text: Yes, I have one bag to check.
Can I check three bags for free?

scenes.npcDialog: Airport shuttle to the city center? It's 15 euros per person.

choices.text: Sure, when is the next one leaving?
How long does it take to the center?
That's too expensive for a shared ride.

scenes.npcDialog: Chinatown has temples, shophouses, and amazing food! Buddha Tooth Relic Temple is beautiful. The night market has great souvenirs!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 차이나타운에 사원, 숍하우스, 맛있는 음식이 있어요! 불아사리탑이 아름다워요. 야시장에 기념품이 많아요!

choices.text: Buddha Tooth Relic Temple sounds fascinating!
I love the colorful shophouses! So photogenic.

scenes.npcDialog: Kampong Glam is the Malay-Arab quarter! Sultan Mosque is beautiful. Haji Lane has trendy boutiques and street art. Great for photos!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 캄퐁 글램은 말레이-아랍 지구예요! 술탄 모스크가 아름다워요. 하지 레인에 트렌디한 부티크와 거리 예술이 있어요. 사진 찍기 좋아요!

choices.text: Street art and boutiques! My kind of neighborhood.
Can I visit the mosque as a tourist?

scenes.npcDialog: Clarke Quay is party central! Bars, restaurants, clubs along the river. The old warehouses are now entertainment venues. Very lively at night!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 클라크 키는 파티 중심지예요! 바, 레스토랑, 클럽이 강을 따라 있어요. 옛 창고들이 지금은 오락 시설이에요. 밤에 아주 활기차요!

choices.text: What's the best bar for cocktails?

scenes.npcDialog: The observation deck closes at 10 PM. Enjoy the view!

choices.text: Great! Is sunset time around 7 today?
Thank you! Can I bring food up there?
I want to stay all night.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any questions about your visit?

choices.text: What time do you close today?
Is the museum open on weekends?

scenes.npcDialog: Nice day to relax in the park, isn't it?

choices.text: It really is! Is it okay to sit on the grass?
Beautiful! Are there any cafes nearby?
I came here to shop, not relax.

scenes.npcDialog: This is a local favorite. Would you like to try our special?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 현지인들이 좋아하는 곳이에요. 저희 스페셜 드셔보실래요?

choices.text: Yes, I'd love to try the local specialty!

scenes.npcDialog: This is handmade by local artisans. 25 euros.

choices.text: It's beautiful! Can I see more designs?
Does it come with any certificate of authenticity?
I can buy this cheaper online.

scenes.npcDialog: Sentosa has beaches, Universal Studios, and the Merlion! Take the cable car for great views. Or the free Sentosa Express monorail!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 센토사에 해변, 유니버설 스튜디오, 머라이언이 있어요! 케이블카 타면 경치 좋아요. 아니면 무료 센토사 익스프레스 모노레일!

choices.text: Universal Studios sounds fun! What rides are best?
I'll take the cable car for the views!
Why is there a Merlion everywhere?

scenes.npcDialog: Night Safari is the world's first nocturnal zoo! Tram ride through 7 zones. See animals active at night - leopards, elephants, flying squirrels!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 나이트 사파리는 세계 최초 야간 동물원이에요! 트램 타고 7개 존을 지나요. 밤에 활동하는 동물들 - 표범, 코끼리, 날다람쥐!

choices.text: Animals at night! That's such a unique concept.
Can we walk through the zones too?
I can see animals in a regular zoo.

scenes.npcDialog: Singapore Botanic Gardens is UNESCO World Heritage! Free entry! The National Orchid Garden has 1,000 orchid species. Very peaceful place.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 싱가포르 식물원은 유네스코 세계유산이에요! 무료 입장! 국립 난초 정원에 1,000종의 난초가 있어요. 아주 평화로운 곳이에요.

choices.text: 1,000 orchid species! The colors must be incredible.
Free entry and UNESCO! That's rare.

scenes.npcDialog: The boat tour is about 1 hour. Would you like window seats?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 보트 투어는 약 1시간이에요. 창가 좌석 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, please. Can we sit on the upper deck?
Are there any commentary in English?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you'd like to know?

choices.text: Can I leave and come back later?
Is re-entry allowed with this ticket?

scenes.npcDialog: What can I get started for you?

choices.text: A latte and a slice of apple pie, please.
What pastries do you have today?
Why is coffee so expensive here?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help with the ATM?

choices.text: Can I use my foreign card here?
Is there a fee for international cards?

scenes.npcDialog: Chilli crab is Singapore's national dish! Not too spicy - more sweet and savory. Order mantou buns to soak up the sauce. Very messy but delicious!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 칠리 크랩은 싱가포르 국민요리예요! 너무 안 매워요 - 달콤하고 고소해요. 만터우 빵 시켜서 소스 찍어 드세요. 지저분하지만 맛있어요!

choices.text: I'll get the mantou buns! Don't want to waste any sauce.
Messy is fine - that's how you know it's good!
I don't like eating with my hands.

scenes.npcDialog: Laksa is spicy coconut curry noodles! Singapore style is richer than Penang. We add prawns, fishcake, and cockles. How spicy you want?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 락사는 매운 코코넛 커리 국수예요! 싱가포르 스타일이 페낭보다 진해요. 새우, 어묵, 조개를 넣어요. 얼마나 맵게요?

choices.text: Medium spicy please! The color is beautiful.
What's the difference from Penang laksa?

scenes.npcDialog: Your last night! Try our peranakan set - Nyonya cuisine combines Chinese and Malay! Or end with our famous Singapore Sling cocktail!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 밤이네요! 페라나칸 세트 드셔보세요 - 뇨냐 요리는 중국과 말레이 융합이에요! 아니면 유명한 싱가포르 슬링 칵테일로 마무리!

choices.text: Peranakan sounds fascinating! What dishes are included?
Singapore Sling to end the trip! Where was it invented?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for souvenirs? These are our bestsellers.

choices.text: Do you have anything under 20 euros?
Souvenirs are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you traveling together? Need a group photo?

choices.text: Yes! Could you take one of all of us?
That would be great, thank you!

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for something specific?

choices.text: Where can I find local snacks?
Do you have any lunch deals?

scenes.npcDialog: The city pass includes unlimited transport and museum entries. 60 euros for 3 days.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 시티패스에 무제한 교통과 박물관 입장이 포함되어 있어요. 3일에 60유로입니다.

choices.text: That sounds like a good deal. I'll take one.

scenes.npcDialog: Little India is so colorful! Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple is stunning. Try the banana leaf curry for lunch. Tekka Market has fresh flowers and spices!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 리틀 인디아는 아주 알록달록해요! 스리 비라마칼리아만 사원이 멋져요. 점심으로 바나나 잎 커리 드셔보세요. 테카 마켓에 생화와 향신료가 있어요!

choices.text: Banana leaf curry! How do I eat it properly?
The colors here are incredible! So vibrant.
Too many colors hurt my eyes.

scenes.npcDialog: MRT is very clean and efficient! No eating, drinking, or durian allowed. Buy an EZ-Link card for convenience. Fines are heavy for breaking rules!
scenes.npcDialogKo: MRT는 아주 깨끗하고 효율적이에요! 음식, 음료, 두리안 금지예요. EZ-Link 카드 사면 편해요. 규칙 어기면 벌금이 세요!

choices.text: No durian allowed! Singapore is famous for strict rules.
Where can I buy an EZ-Link card?

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you plan your day?

choices.text: Do you have a city map?

scenes.npcDialog: How many days are you staying?

choices.text: Can you recommend a walking route?
Just tell me the best thing.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you with tickets?

choices.text: I'd like a day pass, please.
How much is an unlimited daily ticket?
Tickets are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to rent a bike? It's 10 euros for the day.

choices.text: Yes, please! Is a helmet included?
Do you have a city bike map?
I don't know how to ride.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like any information materials?

choices.text: Do you have a brochure in Korean?
Can I get a map of the area?
Paper is bad for the environment.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you prepared for the tour?

choices.text: Will we be outside? Should I bring a jacket?
What kind of shoes should I wear?

scenes.npcDialog: Need help with the tram system?

choices.text: Which line goes to the museum district?
Where do I validate my ticket?

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
